text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'm in front of the golf store in the
shopping mall when I notice a troubled
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hmm, what to do, what to do? I can't decide!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Weeell... this store carries a mega popular brand I
high-key love.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
They just got new Full & BW clubs in stock, and I
was super excited to buy some!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But since they're so popular, they have a limit of
one club type per person...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah! My dad taught me when I was a kid.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
At first, we used our garden as a course. I mostly
saw it as just another way to play around back
then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But now, I'm totally into it. I curate and handpick
every piece of my equipment now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But anyhoo, that's the problem. I'm not sure what
to pick now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
No matter how much I think about it, I'm still
stuck between two options. And there's no
running away from making a choice!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Should I get the tenacious and versatile wedge or
the uber-powerful driver?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
If I think of all the persistence I needed to reach
where I am now, that's exactly what I need!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm gonna grab one before they sell out.
Thanks for helping me decide!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The persistence she needed... Mejiro Palmer's
words leave a heavy impression on me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
If I think of all the unyielding power I need to get
where I am now, that's exactly what I need!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm gonna grab one before they sell out.
Thanks for helping me decide!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The power she needed... Mejiro Palmer's words
leave a heavy impression on me.
